introSection: Lightning Run is a steel roller coaster located at Kentucky Kingdom in Louisville, Kentucky, USA. Opened on May 24, 2014, it is the first Hyper GT-X Coaster built by Chance Rides. The ride's station was previously used for Greezed Lightnin'.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The addition of Lightning Run was announced in November 2013.

Lightning Run opened on May 24, 2014 with the reopened Kentucky Kingdom.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * A picture of the lead car at IAAPA 2013

fullText:
Lightning Run is a steel roller coaster located at Kentucky Kingdom in Louisville, Kentucky, USA. Opened on May 24, 2014, it is the first Hyper GT-X Coaster built by Chance Rides. The ride's station was previously used for Greezed Lightnin'.

The addition of Lightning Run was announced in November 2013.

Lightning Run opened on May 24, 2014 with the reopened Kentucky Kingdom.






 * A picture of the lead car at IAAPA 2013
